name: 摄像头数据采集与设备交互流程(8步)
flowJson: {"nodes":[{"id":"n_start","type":"START","name":"流程开始","x":80,"y":300,"config":{"triggerType":"ONCE"}},{"id":"n_tcp_camera","type":"TCP_CLIENT","name":"Step1-采集摄像头数据","x":250,"y":300,"config":{"host":"localhost","port":9001,"waitResponse":true,"timeout":5000,"outputVariable":"cameraRawData","readMode":"LINE"}},{"id":"n_hex2dec","type":"SCRIPT","name":"Step1-Hex转Dec","x":420,"y":300,"config":{"operations":[{"op":"SPLIT","source":"cameraRawData","target":"hexArray","params":{"delimiter":","}},{"op":"HEX_ARRAY_TO_DEC","source":"hexArray","target":"rs"},{"op":"ARRAY_LENGTH","source":"rs","target":"rsLength"}]}},{"id":"n_check_len","type":"CONDITION","name":"Step2-判断数组>=6","x":590,"y":300,"config":{"logic":"OR","branches":[{"name":"满足条件","condition":{"left":"rsLength","operator":">=","right":6},"nextNodeId":"n_build_json"}],"defaultNextNodeId":"n_end"}},{"id":"n_build_json","type":"SCRIPT","name":"Step3-构建JSON并转hex","x":760,"y":300,"config":{"operations":[{"op":"ARRAY_SLICE","source":"rs","target":"rs6","params":{"start":0,"end":6}},{"op":"JSON_BUILD","target":"broadcastJson","params":{"fields":{"d1":"${rs[0]}","d2":"${rs[1]}","d3":"${rs[2]}","d4":"${rs[3]}","d5":"${rs[4]}","d6":"${rs[5]}"}}},{"op":"STRING_TO_HEX","source":"broadcastJson","target":"broadcastHex"}]}},{"id":"n_broadcast","type":"TCP_SERVER","name":"Step3-广播给下游","x":930,"y":300,"config":{"port":9100,"operation":"BROADCAST","sendData":"${broadcastJson}"}},{"id":"n_wait_ack","type":"TCP_SERVER","name":"Step4-等待指令","x":1100,"y":300,"config":{"port":9100,"operation":"RECEIVE","timeout":15000,"outputVariable":"clientCommand"}},{"id":"n_check_cmd","type":"CONDITION","name":"Step5-判断指令","x":1270,"y":300,"config":{"logic":"OR","branches":[{"name":"ACK匹配","condition":{"left":"clientCommand","operator":"contains","right":"ACK_READY"},"nextNodeId":"n_send_device"}],"defaultNextNodeId":"n_end"}},{"id":"n_send_device","type":"SCRIPT","name":"Step6a-转换v1=x格式","x":1440,"y":300,"config":{"operations":[{"op":"FORMAT_VALUES","source":"rs","target":"formattedValues","params":{"prefix":"v","delimiter":","}},{"op":"STRING_TO_HEX","source":"formattedValues","target":"sendHex"}]}},{"id":"n_tcp_device","type":"TCP_CLIENT","name":"Step6b-发送给设备","x":1610,"y":300,"config":{"host":"localhost","port":9002,"sendData":"${formattedValues}","waitResponse":true,"timeout":5000,"outputVariable":"deviceResponse","readMode":"LINE"}},{"id":"n_parse_resp","type":"SCRIPT","name":"Step6c-解析设备响应","x":1780,"y":300,"config":{"operations":[{"op":"STRIP_PREFIX","source":"deviceResponse","target":"respRaw","params":{"prefix":"OK:"}},{"op":"SPLIT","source":"respRaw","target":"respHexArray","params":{"delimiter":","}},{"op":"HEX_ARRAY_TO_DEC","source":"respHexArray","target":"respDecArray"},{"op":"JSON_BUILD","target":"parsedResult","params":{"fields":{"r1":"${respDecArray[0]}","r2":"${respDecArray[1]}","r3":"${respDecArray[2]}","r4":"${respDecArray[3]}","r5":"${respDecArray[4]}","r6":"${respDecArray[5]}"}}}]}},{"id":"n_log","type":"LOG","name":"Step7-日志记录","x":1950,"y":300,"config":{"message":"设备响应解析完成: ${parsedResult}","dataPath":"parsedResult","logLevel":"INFO","saveToDb":true,"outputVariable":"logEntry"}},{"id":"n_save","type":"DATA_LOAD","name":"Step7-数据保存","x":2120,"y":300,"config":{"dbMode":"LOCAL","sql":"INSERT INTO flow_execution_log (flow_name, node_id, node_name, level, message, data_json, created_at) VALUES ('摄像头采集流程', 'n_save', '数据保存', 'INFO', '设备响应数据', '${parsedResult}', datetime('now'))","outputVariable":"saveResult"}},{"id":"n_http","type":"HTTP_REQUEST","name":"Step8-HTTP推送","x":2290,"y":300,"config":{"url":"http://localhost:18082/api/test/http-receiver/data?result=${parsedResult}&camera=${cameraRawData}","method":"GET","timeout":5000,"outputVariable":"httpResult"}},{"id":"n_end","type":"END","name":"流程结束","x":2460,"y":300,"config":{}}],"edges":[{"id":"e1","source":"n_start","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_tcp_camera","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e2","source":"n_tcp_camera","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_hex2dec","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e3","source":"n_hex2dec","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_check_len","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e4","source":"n_build_json","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_broadcast","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e5","source":"n_broadcast","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_wait_ack","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e6","source":"n_wait_ack","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_check_cmd","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e7","source":"n_send_device","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_tcp_device","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e8","source":"n_tcp_device","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_parse_resp","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e9","source":"n_parse_resp","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_log","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e10","source":"n_log","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_save","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e11","source":"n_save","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_http","targetPort":"in_0"},{"id":"e12","source":"n_http","sourcePort":"out_0","target":"n_end","targetPort":"in_0"}],"variables":[{"name":"cameraRawData","defaultValue":""},{"name":"rs","defaultValue":""},{"name":"rsLength","defaultValue":0},{"name":"broadcastJson","defaultValue":""},{"name":"clientCommand","defaultValue":""},{"name":"formattedValues","defaultValue":""},{"name":"deviceResponse","defaultValue":""},{"name":"parsedResult","defaultValue":""}]}
